title: Tool Registry Entry
description: Metadata for a single callable tool exposed via GET /tools and resolved by the tool registry.

tasks.description: Supported task ids for this tool

model_role.description: Default model role when tool is model-backed

runtime_required.description: Whether a live provider is required

input_schema.description: Path to input JSON schema relative to pack root

output_schema.description: Path to output JSON schema relative to pack root
